title: Day 6 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - きょうとへ　いきます。  = I am going to Kyoto.

Sentence 2 - くにへ　かえります。 = I am going back to my country.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.
